derived_candidate_only_policy: excluded_from_current_direct_GT_compare; not included in v2 review queue except schema/future-derived notes marked no confirmation
authority_rules: Only direct source-backed values are auto-applied.
Coded factor levels may be converted to actual values only when the same source table explicitly maps code to actual level.
Derived values such as concentration x volume -> mass are excluded from current direct comparison and deferred to later derived provenance stage.
System outputs are triage hints only, not value authority.
